name: Beef Fajitas--a1 Steak Sauce Version
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup A-1® Steak Sauce, original or bold
1 pound boneless sirloin steak, thinly sliced
1 large green bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonmetal bowl, combine the A-1 Steak Sauce, red wine vinegar, 2 tablespoons oil, hickory seasoning, minced garlic, and hot pepper seasoning.
2. Add the steak; stir to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove the steak from the marinade and set aside. Reserve the marinade.
4. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, sauté the steak in the remaining 2 tablespoons oil for 5 to 6 minutes or until no longer pink. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the steak to a clean bowl and keep warm.
5. In the same skillet, sauté the green bell pepper and onion for 5 to 6 minutes or until tender-crisp.
6. Add the reserved marinade; heat to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in the steak; heat through.
7. Serve in warm tortillas topped with sour cream and shredded cheddar cheese. Makes 4 servings.
